title: PM Lane 291 - Project Miner Temp Power Actuals And Customer Rules Intake And Capture Design No-Live Packet
authority_basis: Jason's 2026-05-18 standing PM blocker authority plus the explicit instruction to continue as PM and lane authority without per-step approval.
purpose: Intake the latest downstream rule return after the PM Lane 289 relay prompt.
Classify the reply as actuals/customer only with no finance or source-writeback admission.
Record accepted no-live defaults for actuals/labor capture and customer report preview.
Keep all finance outputs, source writeback, and live output behavior blocked while queuing the next no-live capture-contract lane.

accepted_actuals_and_labor_rules.granularity: Task plus apparatus when available; otherwise task and day.
required_evidence_before_nonzero_actuals: Signed field ticket or daily field record
Supporting test sheet, PM-approved field note, or photo evidence when applicable
accepted_actuals_and_labor_rules.correction_rule: Append-only void and replacement only; no destructive edits.

accepted_customer_report_and_delivery_ru.artifact_scope: Preview only in a later no-live design lane.
accepted_customer_report_and_delivery_ru.recipient_and_authoritative_channel: Named customer PM or owner representative through controlled email or a later approved portal.

design_consequences: Actuals capture may be designed only as a no-live contract and review surface.
Customer report may be designed only as a preview artifact with no durable delivery event.
No finance output behavior may be designed from this lane's accepted rules.
No source writeback or macro behavior may be designed from this lane's accepted rules.
Any future live or durable output path still requires separate explicit admission.
